title: rhodanthemum gayanum subsp. fallax
intro: Rhodanthemum gayanum subsp. fallax, a lesser-known variety of the larger Rhodanthemum gayanum species, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Rhodanthemum gayanum subsp. fallax include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in some traditional medicine practices. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
